findings.title: Authentication endpoint without rate limiting
findings.message: Authentication endpoint detected without rate limiting. Login, registration, and password reset endpoints MUST implement rate limiting to prevent brute-force and credential stuffing attacks per OWASP A04:2025.

findings.title: File upload without type validation
findings.message: File upload without type validation. File uploads MUST validate file type, size, and content before processing per OWASP A04:2025.

findings.title: User input stored directly in session without validation
findings.message: User input stored directly in session without validation. Data crossing trust boundaries MUST be validated before storage per OWASP A04:2025.
